criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance the shopping experience.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, developer information.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: Overall user satisfaction and ease of use of the app.

criteria.name: Product Variety
criteria.description: The range and diversity of products available through the app.

criteria.name: Price Comparison
criteria.description: The app's ability to compare prices across different retailers.

criteria.name: Personalization
criteria.description: The app's capability to provide personalized recommendations based on user preferences.
